sections.paragraph:
- Original: προσαναλίσκω

- Transliteration: Prosanalisko

- Phonetic: pros-an-al-is'-ko

- Definition:

1. to expend besides (i.e. upon physicians)

- Origin: from G4314 and G355

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4314 and G355; to expend further: - spend.
